CustomerAndSuppliersByCity.description: Combined list of customers and suppliers organized by city, showing company name, contact name, and whether the record is a Customer or Supplier

fields.name: City
fields.description: City where the customer or supplier is located

fields.name: CompanyName
fields.description: Name of the customer or supplier company

fields.name: ContactName
fields.description: Name of the primary contact person at the company

fields.name: Relationship
fields.description: Indicates whether the record is a 'Customers' or 'Suppliers' entry

AlphabeticalListOfProducts.description: Alphabetical listing of all products with their category names and full product details including pricing and inventory levels

fields.name: ProductID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: SupplierID
fields.description: Foreign key to the supplier providing this product

fields.name: CategoryID
fields.description: Foreign key to the product category

fields.name: QuantityPerUnit
fields.description: Standard packaging description (e.g., '12 bottles per case', '1kg pkg')

fields.name: UnitPrice
fields.description: Current retail price per unit in USD

fields.name: UnitsInStock
fields.description: Current inventory count available for purchase

fields.name: UnitsOnOrder
fields.description: Quantity ordered from supplier but not yet received

fields.name: ReorderLevel
fields.description: Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder from supplier

fields.name: Discontinued
fields.description: True (1) if the product is no longer available for sale, False (0) if active

fields.name: CategoryName
fields.description: Name of the product category (e.g., Beverages, Condiments, Seafood)

CurrentProductList.description: Simple list of currently active (non-discontinued) products showing only ProductID and ProductName

fields.name: ProductID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

OrdersQry.description: Orders with full customer information including company name, address, city, region, postal code, and country - useful for order lookups with customer details. For date filters use OData v4 DateTimeOffset: e.g. OrderDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and OrderDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z (no quotes around dates).

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.description: Five-character customer identifier code

fields.name: EmployeeID
fields.description: Foreign key to the employee who processed the order

fields.name: OrderDate
fields.description: Date when the order was placed (DateTimeOffset - filter example: OrderDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: RequiredDate
fields.description: Date by which the customer requested delivery (DateTimeOffset - filter example: RequiredDate le 1997-12-31T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: ShippedDate
fields.description: Actual date the order was shipped, null if not yet shipped (DateTimeOffset - filter example: ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and ShippedDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: ShipVia
fields.description: Foreign key to the shipping company used for delivery

fields.name: Freight
fields.description: Shipping freight charge in USD

fields.name: ShipName
fields.description: Name of the recipient for the shipment

fields.name: ShipAddress
fields.description: Street address for the shipment delivery

fields.name: ShipCity
fields.description: City for the shipment delivery

fields.name: ShipRegion
fields.description: State or region for the shipment delivery (may be null)

fields.name: ShipPostalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code for the shipment delivery

fields.name: ShipCountry
fields.description: Country for the shipment delivery

fields.name: CompanyName
fields.description: Name of the customer company that placed the order

fields.name: Address
fields.description: Street address of the customer company

fields.name: City
fields.description: City where the customer company is located

fields.name: Region
fields.description: State or region of the customer company (may be null)

fields.name: PostalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code of the customer company

fields.name: Country
fields.description: Country where the customer company is located

ProductsAboveAveragePrice.description: Products with unit prices above the overall average product price - useful for identifying premium or high-value products

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: UnitPrice
fields.description: Current retail price per unit in USD (all values exceed the average product price)

ProductsByCategory.description: Products grouped by category showing category name, product name, quantity per unit, units in stock, and discontinued status

fields.name: CategoryName
fields.description: Name of the product category (e.g., Beverages, Condiments, Seafood)

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: QuantityPerUnit
fields.description: Standard packaging description (e.g., '12 bottles per case', '1kg pkg')

fields.name: UnitsInStock
fields.description: Current inventory count available for purchase

fields.name: Discontinued
fields.description: True (1) if the product is no longer available for sale, False (0) if active

QuarterlyOrders.description: Distinct customers who placed orders in 1997, showing customer ID, company name, city, and country

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.description: Five-character unique customer identifier code

fields.name: CompanyName
fields.description: Name of the customer company

fields.name: City
fields.description: City where the customer is located

fields.name: Country
fields.description: Country where the customer is located

Invoices.description: Comprehensive invoice details combining orders, customers, employees, shippers, products, and order details with calculated extended prices and freight costs. IMPORTANT: This returns individual line items, not aggregates. For date filters use OData v4 DateTimeOffset format without quotes, e.g. filter: ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and ShippedDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z. Supported filter operators: eq, ne, gt, ge, lt, le, and, or, not. String filters: contains(Field,'value'), startswith(Field,'value'), endswith(Field,'value'). Do NOT use year(), datetime'...', or quoted date strings.

fields.name: ShipName
fields.description: Name of the recipient for the shipment

fields.name: ShipAddress
fields.description: Street address for the shipment delivery

fields.name: ShipCity
fields.description: City for the shipment delivery

fields.name: ShipRegion
fields.description: State or region for the shipment delivery (may be null)

fields.name: ShipPostalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code for the shipment delivery

fields.name: ShipCountry
fields.description: Country for the shipment delivery

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.description: Five-character unique customer identifier code

fields.name: CustomerName
fields.description: Name of the customer company on the invoice

fields.name: Address
fields.description: Street address of the customer

fields.name: City
fields.description: City where the customer is located

fields.name: Region
fields.description: State or region of the customer (may be null)

fields.name: PostalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code of the customer

fields.name: Country
fields.description: Country where the customer is located

fields.name: Salesperson
fields.description: Full name of the sales employee who handled the order

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: OrderDate
fields.description: Date when the order was placed (DateTimeOffset - filter example: OrderDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: RequiredDate
fields.description: Date by which the customer requested delivery (DateTimeOffset - filter example: RequiredDate le 1997-12-31T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: ShippedDate
fields.description: Actual date the order was shipped, null if not yet shipped (DateTimeOffset - filter example: ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and ShippedDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: ShipperName
fields.description: Name of the shipping company used for delivery

fields.name: ProductID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product on this invoice line

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: UnitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit in USD at the time of the order

fields.name: Quantity
fields.description: Number of units ordered for this line item

fields.name: Discount
fields.description: Discount percentage applied to this line item (0.0 to 1.0 scale)

fields.name: ExtendedPrice
fields.description: Calculated line total: UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount) in USD

fields.name: Freight
fields.description: Shipping freight charge for the entire order in USD

OrderDetailsExtended.description: Order line items with product names and calculated extended price (UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount))

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: ProductID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product on this order line

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: UnitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit in USD at the time of the order

fields.name: Quantity
fields.description: Number of units ordered for this line item

fields.name: Discount
fields.description: Discount percentage applied to this line item (0.0 to 1.0 scale)

fields.name: ExtendedPrice
fields.description: Calculated line total: UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount) in USD

OrderSubtotals.description: Subtotal amount for each order, calculated as the sum of extended prices across all line items in the order

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: Subtotal
fields.description: Sum of all line item extended prices for this order in USD

ProductSalesFor1997.description: Product sales totals for the year 1997, grouped by category and product name, showing the total sales amount per product

fields.name: CategoryName
fields.description: Name of the product category (e.g., Beverages, Condiments, Seafood)

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: ProductSales
fields.description: Total sales amount for this product in 1997 in USD

CategorySalesFor1997.description: Aggregated sales totals by product category for the year 1997

fields.name: CategoryName
fields.description: Name of the product category (e.g., Beverages, Condiments, Seafood)

fields.name: CategorySales
fields.description: Total aggregated sales amount for this category in 1997 in USD

SalesByCategory.description: Sales totals grouped by category and product for orders placed in 1997, including category ID, category name, product name, and total product sales

fields.name: CategoryID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product category

fields.name: CategoryName
fields.description: Name of the product category (e.g., Beverages, Condiments, Seafood)

fields.name: ProductName
fields.description: Display name of the product

fields.name: ProductSales
fields.description: Total sales amount for this product within this category in 1997 in USD

SalesTotalsByAmount.description: Orders with subtotals exceeding $2,500 that were shipped in 1997, including sale amount, order ID, company name, and shipped date

fields.name: SaleAmount
fields.description: Total sale amount for the order in USD (only orders exceeding $2,500)

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: CompanyName
fields.description: Name of the customer company that placed the order

fields.name: ShippedDate
fields.description: Date when the order was shipped (DateTimeOffset - filter example: ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and ShippedDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z)

SummaryOfSalesByQuarter.description: Summary of shipped orders with their subtotals, useful for quarterly sales analysis by shipped date. For date filters use OData v4 DateTimeOffset: e.g. ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z (no quotes around dates).

fields.name: ShippedDate
fields.description: Date when the order was shipped, used for quarterly grouping (DateTimeOffset - filter example: ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and ShippedDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: Subtotal
fields.description: Total order amount in USD (sum of all line item extended prices)

SummaryOfSalesByYear.description: Summary of shipped orders with their subtotals, useful for yearly sales analysis by shipped date. For date filters use OData v4 DateTimeOffset: e.g. ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z (no quotes around dates).

fields.name: ShippedDate
fields.description: Date when the order was shipped, used for yearly grouping (DateTimeOffset - filter example: ShippedDate ge 1997-01-01T00:00:00Z and ShippedDate lt 1998-01-01T00:00:00Z)

fields.name: OrderID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order

fields.name: Subtotal
fields.description: Total order amount in USD (sum of all line item extended prices)
